<a id="type-com-daml-ledger-api-v2-admin-packagemanagementserviceouterclass-vettedpackagesref"></a>

### `PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/admin/PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRefOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A reference to identify one or more packages. A reference matches a package if its ``package_id`` matches the package's ID, its ``package_name`` matches the package's name, and its ``package_version`` matches the package's version. If an attribute in the reference is left unspecified (i.e. as an empty string), that attribute is treated as a wildcard. At a minimum, ``package_id`` or the ``package_name`` must be specified. If a reference does not match any package, the reference is considered unresolved and the entire update request is rejected. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.admin.VettedPackagesRef

### `PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef.Builder`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/admin/PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef.Builder.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRef.Builder> implements PackageManagementServiceOuterClass.VettedPackagesRefOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A reference to identify one or more packages. A reference matches a package if its ``package_id`` matches the package's ID, its ``package_name`` matches the package's name, and its ``package_version`` matches the package's version. If an attribute in the reference is left unspecified (i.e. as an empty string), that attribute is treated as a wildcard. At a minimum, ``package_id`` or the ``package_name`` must be specified. If a reference does not match any package, the reference is considered unresolved and the entire update request is rejected. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.admin.VettedPackagesRef

**Summary**

The rights of a participant's super reader. Its utility is predominantly for feeding external tools, such as PQS, continually without the need to change subscriptions as new parties pop in and out of existence. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.admin.Right.CanReadAsAnyParty

**Summary**

The rights of a participant's super reader. Its utility is predominantly for feeding external tools, such as PQS, continually without the need to change subscriptions as new parties pop in and out of existence. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.admin.Right.CanReadAsAnyParty
